LatLng.title: LatLng
LatLng.description: A geographic coordinate with latitude, longitude, and an optional altitude.

Ordering.title: Ordering

descending.description: true for DESC ordering, false for ASC ordering.

Ordering.description: A single ordering definition within an ORDER BY clause.

GraphTerm.title: GraphTerm
GraphTerm.description: A term that can appear in an RDF graph: either a named node (IRI), a labelled named node (IRI with label), or a literal. Discriminated by the subType property ('namedNode' vs 'literal') and the presence of a 'label' property.

MapFilter.title: MapFilter

coordType.description: The shape type of the geographic selection area.

coordinates.description: Array of coordinate rings. Each ring is an array of LatLng points defining the boundary of the area.

MapFilter.description: A geographic area filter defined by a polygon or rectangle on a map. Generates a SPARQL FILTER with spatial comparisons on latitude/longitude values.

DateFilter.title: DateFilter

stop.description: End date in ISO 8601 format or just a year. Absent if no upper bound.

start.description: Start date in ISO 8601 format (e.g. '2023-10-05T14:48:00.000Z') or just a year (e.g. '2023', '-0450' for 450 BC). Absent if no lower bound.

DateFilter.description: A date range filter generating a SPARQL FILTER with >= and/or <= comparisons on date values. At least one of start or stop must be defined.

PatternBind.title: PatternBind

variable.description: The variable to which the aggregate result is bound.

expression.description: The aggregate expression (e.g. COUNT, SUM, GROUP_CONCAT).

PatternBind.description: A BIND pattern that binds the result of an aggregate expression to a variable. Used in the variables array when a column is an aggregation (e.g. COUNT, SUM, GROUP_CONCAT).

TermLiteral.title: TermLiteral

label.description: Optional human-readable label for display in the Sparnatural UI.

value.description: The lexical value of the literal.

langOrIri.description: Language tag (string, e.g. 'en') for language-tagged literals, or a TermIri for datatype IRIs (e.g. xsd:boolean, xsd:integer). Absent for plain string literals.

TermLiteral.description: An RDF literal term. Can be a plain literal (no language or datatype), a language-tagged literal (langOrIri is a string like 'en'), or a datatype literal (langOrIri is a TermIri like xsd:boolean).

NumberFilter.title: NumberFilter

max.description: Maximum value (inclusive). Absent if no upper bound.

min.description: Minimum value (inclusive). Absent if no lower bound.

NumberFilter.description: A numeric range filter generating a SPARQL FILTER with >= and/or <= comparisons. At least one of min or max must be defined.

SearchFilter.title: SearchFilter

search.description: The search string or regex pattern.

SearchFilter.description: A text search filter. Interpreted as a regex in plain SPARQL (FILTER regex()), or as a fulltext search string when using a triplestore with fulltext search capabilities (e.g. GraphDB Lucene connector).

TermVariable.title: TermVariable

value.description: Variable name without the '?' prefix. Typically follows the pattern ClassName_N (e.g. Artwork_1, Museum_2).

TermVariable.description: An RDF variable term. The value is the variable name without the '?' prefix.

QueryMetadata.title: QueryMetadata

id.description: Unique identifier for the query, typically a UUID.

date.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the query was saved.

lang.description: BCP47 language code of the UI when the query was generated.

label.description: Short labels for the query, keyed by language code.

isFavorite.description: Whether the query is marked as a favorite.

examples.en: Find all artworks displayed in museums located in France

description.description: Longer descriptions for the query, keyed by language code.

examples: One or more criteria could not be interpreted.
explanation.description: Explanation of the query construction, partial understanding, or domain rejection reason.

examples: L'utilisateur demande des spécialités → sujet racine : SpecialitePharmaceutique (Cat.A)
La voie est 'intraveineuse' → SpecialitePharmaceutique_voie → Voie (Cat.B) avec values URI_NOT_FOUND label 'intraveineuse'
Le libellé CIP contient 'multidose' → SpecialitePharmaceutique_aPourPresentation → Presentation → Presentation_label avec searchFilter 'multidose'
reasoning.description: Step-by-step reasoning trace explaining the query construction decisions: root subject selection, property choices from 8d, traversal paths, filter types, and ambiguity resolutions.

QueryMetadata.description: Optional metadata associated with a saved query, including identifiers, timestamps, multilingual labels, descriptions, and reasoning trace.

LabelledFilter.title: LabelledFilter

label.description: Human-readable label describing the filter criteria.

filter.description: The actual filter definition. One of: dateFilter, numberFilter, searchFilter, mapFilter.

LabelledFilter.description: A filter with a human-readable label. The label preserves the user's input for display purposes when reloading the query in the Sparnatural UI.

ObjectCriteria.title: ObjectCriteria

values.description: Selected values from List, Autocomplete, Boolean, or Tree widgets. Items are GraphTerm objects (flat list of named nodes or literals) or ValuePatternRow objects (keyed by variable name for multi-variable VALUES clauses).

filters.description: Labelled filters from Date, Number, Search, or Map widgets. Each filter generates a SPARQL FILTER clause.

variable.description: The object variable with its associated RDF type.

predicateObjectPairs.description: Nested predicate-object pairs when the user adds child criteria (deeper levels in the Sparnatural query tree).

ObjectCriteria.description: Holds the criteria selected by the user for a given object in a predicate-object pair. Depending on the widget type configured for the property, criteria are stored as values (for selection widgets like List, Autocomplete, Boolean, Tree), filters (for range/condition widgets like Date, Number, Search, Map), or nested predicateObjectPairs (for child criteria when no value widget is shown).

TermLabelledIri.title: TermLabelledIri

label.description: Human-readable label for the IRI, as displayed in the Sparnatural UI.

TermLabelledIri.description: An RDF named node (IRI) with a human-readable label. Used in values to preserve the display label for the selected resource, so that Sparnatural can show it without re-fetching.

ValuePatternRow.title: ValuePatternRow
ValuePatternRow.description: A single row in a SPARQL VALUES clause. Each key is a variable name (without '?') and each value is a GraphTerm or undefined (UNDEF in SPARQL VALUES).

SparnaturalQuery.title: SparnaturalQuery

where.description: The main WHERE clause, structured as a BGP with a single shared subject.

subType.description: Query form. Currently only 'SELECT' is supported.

distinct.description: When present and true, the DISTINCT keyword is added to the SELECT clause.

metadata.description: Optional metadata about the query (id, date, descriptions, favorites).

variables.description: Ordered list of variables or aggregated expressions selected in the SELECT clause.

solutionModifiers.description: Solution modifiers for ordering and limiting results.

SparnaturalQuery.description: The root query object representing a SPARQL SELECT query with Sparnatural-specific extensions for labels, types, and tree structure.

SolutionModifiers.title: SolutionModifiers
SolutionModifiers.description: SPARQL solution modifiers for ordering results and setting limit/offset.

TermTypedVariable.title: TermTypedVariable

rdfType.description: The RDF class IRI associated with this variable.

TermTypedVariable.description: A variable term with an associated RDF type. Used for subjects and objects to preserve the class information needed to reconstruct the Sparnatural visual state (generates rdf:type triple patterns).

ExpressionAggregate.title: ExpressionAggregate

distinct.description: Whether DISTINCT is applied inside the aggregate function.

separator.description: Separator string for GROUP_CONCAT aggregation. Only used when aggregation is 'group_concat'.

expression.description: The variable(s) being aggregated. Currently limited to a single TermVariable.

aggregation.description: The aggregation function name (lowercase): count, sum, avg, min, max, sample, group_concat.

ExpressionAggregate.description: An aggregate expression such as COUNT, SUM, AVG, MIN, MAX, SAMPLE, or GROUP_CONCAT. Used inside a PatternBind to define aggregated columns.

PredicateObjectPair.title: PredicateObjectPair

object.description: The object criteria containing the target variable and any selected values, filters, or nested pairs.

subType.description: Optional modifier. 'optional' generates SPARQL OPTIONAL { }. 'notExists' generates FILTER NOT EXISTS { }. If absent, the pair is mandatory.

predicate.description: The property IRI used as predicate in the triple pattern.

PredicateObjectPair.description: A predicate-object pair in a BGP. Represents a single criterion line in the Sparnatural visual query builder. Can optionally be marked as optional or notExists.

PatternBgpSameSubject.title: PatternBgpSameSubject

subject.description: The shared subject variable of all triple patterns in this BGP, with its RDF type.

predicateObjectPairs.description: Ordered list of predicate-object pairs attached to this subject.

PatternBgpSameSubject.description: A Basic Graph Pattern where all triple patterns share the same subject. This is the main structural element of the WHERE clause in Sparnatural queries.

SolutionModifierOrder.title: SolutionModifierOrder

orderDefs.description: List of ordering definitions, applied in sequence.

SolutionModifierOrder.description: Defines the ORDER BY clause with one or more ordering definitions.

SolutionModifierLimitOffset.title: SolutionModifierLimitOffset

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return.

SolutionModifierLimitOffset.description: Defines the LIMIT clause for restricting the number of results returned.

title: Sparnatural Query v13
description: JSON Schema for the Sparnatural query format v13. Describes the custom JSON data structure emitted by Sparnatural in the queryUpdated event and reloadable via sparnatural.loadQuery(). Encodes a SPARQL SELECT query with additional metadata (labels, types, tree structure) that Sparnatural needs to reconstruct its visual query builder state.
